name: Riley (Pokémon)
description:
Riley from Pokemon DPPT

Bots are Semi-Canon. I keep as close to canon as possible, but add some personal characterizations that would not be too unfitting or out of character.

Please only leave fair and nice comments. I do this as a hobby, and do not want any nonsense. Criticism is not asked for, but OK.

If you have issues with repetition, character talking for you, character making up lore, and such: this is likely the AI being dumb. REMEMBER: YOU CAN EDIT/REROLL MESSAGES, AND CHAT MEMORY CAN ADD LORE OR HELP BOT REMEMBER. USE YOUR TOOLS.

NO REQUESTS!

BOTS AGED UP OVER 18 WHEN REQUIRED TO DO SO.
creator: greenfoxlady25
